Giving small businesses more time to

HR, fully handled

running your HR.

HR that fits you

want to
get more out of
it. Get experienced
HR expertise and
guidance to lean
on.
Explore HR
Plus
Find the option that fits your needs.
Take our Assessment
Book a Demo
See Why 22,000+ Businesses Choose TriNet
Cybriant
Jeff Heilig, Owner & Co-Founder
Macs Adventure
Alex Fitterer, People Services Manager
Le Botaniste
Laurent Francois, Co-Founder & CEO
Fairytale Brownies
Eileen Spitalny, Founder & Co-owner
Offer Benefits
Competitive benefits help attract and retain top talent—79% of employees say that having benefits that meet their needs is very important when choosing a job.
*
*
TriNet State of the Workplace (2024)
Learn More
Run Payroll
Efficient, timely payroll processing from an industry leader—
we processed $70 billion in payroll in 2025.
*
*This reflects the amount across TriNet PEO and HR Plus solutions
Learn More
Stay Compliant
Help mitigate risks that can be costly with compliance support. We help you navigate complex federal, state, and local rules and requirements.
Learn More
Learn about our services
HR Consulting Expertise
Receive guidance on intricate HR challenges so you can maintain best practices.
Learn more about our HR consulting
expertise
Access to Big-Company Benefits
Seamlessly manage — and give employees access to — comprehensive benefits packages.
Learn more about our
benefits
Headache-Free Payroll
Take care of all aspects of payroll processing, helps to ensure timely, accurate payment and payroll tax compliance.
Learn more about
payroll
Risk Mitigation and Up-to-Date HR Compliance
Navigate the complexities of employment-related compliance concerns, staying up to date with federal, state and local requirements.
Learn more about risk
mitigation
A Complete HR Platform
Intuitive tools to help automate HR processes like time tracking, leave requests, and more.
Learn more about our HR
platform
Go Global
International payroll, benefits, compliance—managed with ease through a single experience.
Learn more about
global
Optimize HR with ease
We offer a range of HR solutions tailored to your industry and at any stage of the company, whether you’re enhancing an existing program or building something from the ground up. Get access to benefits, technology and expertise you need to move your business forward.
Learn more about our solutions
Don’t just take our word for it.
Recent Insights
Culture
Building a Thriving Multigenerational Workforce: How SMBs Can Turn Differences into a Competitive Advantage
Today’s workforce is more diverse than ever, not just in background or geography, but in age and experience. Four generations are actively working side by side: Baby Boomers, Gen X, Millennials, and Gen Z. For small and medium-size businesses (SMBs), this creates both complexity and opportunity.
June 29, 2026
Read
More
Industry Insights
California Stats: What Workplace Data Says, Regionally
New California workplace data reveals what employees actually value—from benefits and flexibility to turnover risk. See where employers are misaligned and how to close the gap.
June 29, 2026
Read
More
AI
AI for Admin. Never for Clinical. Inside One California Practice's Operating Rule.
California employers use AI 14 points more than their employees. One founder explains why she uses it— except where judgment matters.
June 29, 2026
Read
More
View All Insights
Frequently Asked
Questions
How do I know if I need a PEO or ASO?
Every business is different. Our free HR Solution Assessment helps you determine whether a PEO, ASO, or similar solution could be the best fit for your needs.
Take the
Assessment
What size businesses do you work with?
We work with small to medium-size businesses with five to more than 1,000 employees. We tailor our solutions to your company’s needs.
Connect with us
now
How does your pricing work?
Many factors go into our pricing structure, including the state of your business and the size of your company. Once you meet with one of our consultants, we can provide a personalized quote.
Connect with us now
What HR solutions do you offer?
We offer two HR solutions tailored to your needs: our full PEO offering, TriNet PEO, and our platform plus support solution, HR Plus.
Connect with us now
Learn how TriNet’s comprehensive HR solutions can help your business.
Fill out the form and we’ll contact you to set up a time to chat.

Information
TriNet uses cookies to optimize your experience on our website. By using TriNet’s website, you agree to the use of these cookies. To learn more, read our
Privacy Notice
Accept
Don't Accept
Cookie Settings
Opt-Out Request Honored
Cookie Preference Center
We and our service providers use technologies such as cookies, beacons, tags, and scripts in order to gather information about your use of the website. Most cookies are "session cookies," meaning they are automatically deleted at the end of a browsing session. We and our service providers use session cookies to make it easier for you to navigate the website. We also use persistent cookies. A persistent cookie remains on your hard drive for an extended period of time after you finish browsing a website and remembers your preferences. You may opt-out of these technologies (except for essential website cookies) using a web browser that supports do-not-track functionality such as Global Privacy Control, if available, or by manually opting out by adjusting the toggles below. To learn more about the categories of cookies used on our site, please click on the different category headings.  You can change your cookie preferences at any time. For more information on our privacy practices, please review our
TriNet Privacy Policy
Do Not Sell or Share My Information
TriNet does not sell your Personal Information.  However, some cookies may be considered a “sale” or “share” under applicable law. You can opt out using browser do‑not‑track functionality, such as Global Privacy Control, if available, or by opting out of Advertising (Targeting) Cookies by adjusting the toggle below.
Other Privacy Rights
To see what other privacy rights that may be available to you, please see
How to Exercise Your Data Rights
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Essential Website Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with the services and features available through our site. Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the site, you cannot opt-out of them.
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests. They also perform functions like ensuring that ads are properly displayed and, in some cases, selecting advertisements that are based on your interests.
Performance and Functionality Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
These cookies are used to improve and personalize your experience while visiting our site. They do this by helping us remember your preferences (e.g., language settings or login details), enabling certain tools to function (e.g., use of chatbots or commenting abilities), and providing us with metrics to improve technical performance (e.g., load speeds or bounce rates). While these cookies allow us to optimize your user experience, they are not essential for this site to work properly. Please note that, without these cookies, certain features may become unavailable.

Do Not Sell or Share My Information
TriNet does not sell your Personal Information.  However, some cookies may be considered a “sale” or “share” under applicable law. You can opt out using browser do‑not‑track functionality, such as Global Privacy Control, if available, or by opting out of Advertising (Targeting) Cookies by adjusting the toggle below.
Other Privacy Rights
To see what other privacy rights that may be available to you, please see
How to Exercise Your Data Rights
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Essential Website Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with the services and features available through our site. Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the site, you cannot opt-out of them.
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests. They also perform functions like ensuring that ads are properly displayed and, in some cases, selecting advertisements that are based on your interests.
Performance and Functionality Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
These cookies are used to improve and personalize your experience while visiting our site. They do this by helping us remember your preferences (e.g., language settings or login details), enabling certain tools to function (e.g., use of chatbots or commenting abilities), and providing us with metrics to improve technical performance (e.g., load speeds or bounce rates). While these cookies allow us to optimize your user experience, they are not essential for this site to work properly. Please note that, without these cookies, certain features may become unavailable.

analysis.name: TriNet
analysis.tagline: Giving small businesses more time to think big.
analysis.value_proposition: Full-service PEO and flexible HR outsourcing combining payroll, benefits, and compliance with expert HR support for SMBs.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small and medium-size businesses seeking outsourced HR, payroll, and big-company benefits access

features.name: peo services
features.description: Full-service HR solution for payroll, benefits, and compliance
features.evidence_quote: Full-service HR solution for payroll, benefits and compliance – powered by a platform and expertise

features.name: hr outsourcing
features.description: Outsourced HR services via HR Plus (ASO) offering
features.evidence_quote: Outsourced services for HR, payroll processing and payroll tax compliance

features.name: payroll processing
features.description: Timely payroll processing; processed $70B in payroll in 2025
features.evidence_quote: we processed $70 billion in payroll in 2025

features.name: payroll tax compliance
features.description: Handles payroll tax filings and compliance
features.evidence_quote: outsourced services for HR, payroll processing and payroll tax compliance

features.name: employee benefits administration
features.description: Access to comprehensive big-company benefits packages
features.evidence_quote: Seamlessly manage — and give employees access to — comprehensive benefits packages

features.evidence_quote: We help you navigate complex federal, state, and local rules and requirements

features.name: risk mitigation

features.evidence_quote: Receive guidance on intricate HR challenges so you can maintain best practices

features.evidence_quote: automate HR processes like time tracking, leave requests, and more
